title: Cosmetic Gift Boxes – Perfume, Skincare & Makeup Packaging

blocks.text: Cosmetic Gift Boxes – Perfume, Skincare & Makeup Packaging

Luxury cosmetic gift boxes engineered for perfume, skincare sets, and makeup collections. Premium rigid and folding cartons with hot-foil, embossing, and FSC®-certified materials for global beauty brands.
• Custom rigid & folding gift boxes for perfume, skincare & makeup
Custom rigid & folding gift boxes for perfume, skincare & makeup
• FSC®-certified boards, water-based inks & eco coatings
FSC®-certified boards, water-based inks & eco coatings
• Hot foil, embossing, UV & special finishes for luxury beauty lines
Hot foil, embossing, UV & special finishes for luxury beauty lines
• Production in Vietnam & China with ISO 9001 & SMETA certifications
Production in Vietnam & China with ISO 9001 & SMETA certifications
Premium Cosmetic Gift Boxes for Modern Beauty Brands

Jinhao Xinyuan Group designs and manufactures cosmetic gift boxes that do more than just protect the product – they sell it. Our factories in Vietnam and China produce high-end rigid boxes and folding cartons tailored for perfume, skincare kits, makeup palettes, cosmetics gift sets and PR boxes.

Using FSC®-certified paperboard, G7®-calibrated printing, and ISO 9001 quality systems, we deliver cosmetic packaging that meets the expectations of global retailers and beauty brands in Europe, North America, and Asia.
Perfume Gift Boxes

Rigid boxes with custom-cut foam or cardboard inserts for single or multi-bottle sets

High-gloss, soft-touch or matte laminations for a premium shelf feel

Options for magnetic closure, slipcase, drawer-style and book-style formats

Hot-foil stamping for logos, neck labels or pattern details

Multi-compartment trays for serums, creams, ampoules and masks

Lift-out or removable inserts for refill or seasonal campaigns

FSC®-Certified Cosmetic Packaging with Eco Design

Sustainability is built into both our material selection and our production process. Jinhao Xinyuan Group operates under FSC®, ISO 9001, SMETA and ISTA frameworks, supporting brands with demanding CSR targets.
Material Options
• FSC®-certified paperboard in coated and uncoated grades
FSC®-certified paperboard in coated and uncoated grades
• Greyboard and specialty boards from responsibly managed fiber sources
Greyboard and specialty boards from responsibly managed fiber sources
• Water-based inks and low-VOC coatings
Water-based inks and low-VOC coatings
• Options for recyclable laminations and alternative coatings
Options for recyclable laminations and alternative coatings
Sustainable Production Practices
• ISO 9001 quality management and SMETA-4P social compliance audits
ISO 9001 quality management and SMETA-4P social compliance audits
• Closed-loop waste collection and recycling of paper trim
Closed-loop waste collection and recycling of paper trim
• Eco-optimized layouts to reduce board usage and transport weight
Eco-optimized layouts to reduce board usage and transport weight
For brands that require documented compliance, our team can provide FSC®, ISO, SMETA and ISTA certificates or test reports on request.
Complete Cosmetic Packaging Sets from One Supplier
To simplify sourcing, we can supply full packaging systems that match your cosmetic gift boxes:
• Adhesive labels and stickers for bottles, jars, caps and outer boxes, produced on offset, flexo and digital lines for both large runs and short-run launches
Adhesive labels and stickers for bottles, jars, caps and outer boxes, produced on offset, flexo and digital lines for both large runs and short-run launches
• Printed instruction leaflets and product manuals with multi-language layouts, G7®-calibrated printing and multiple binding options
Printed instruction leaflets and product manuals with multi-language layouts, G7®-calibrated printing and multiple binding options
• Folding cartons and food-grade packaging when you combine cosmetic items with edible gifts or promotional snacks
Folding cartons and food-grade packaging when you combine cosmetic items with edible gifts or promotional snacks
This integrated production reduces color variations, lead times and coordination complexity.
Engineered for Retail Shelves and Online Shipping
Cosmetic gift boxes must look perfect in-store and arrive intact via courier. Our packaging is designed for both.

Vietnam & China Production Hubs for Cosmetic Packaging
Jinhao Xinyuan Group operates a multi-country production network with factories in Vietnam, China and Thailand, giving brands capacity, redundancy and tariff flexibility.
Vietnam Xinyuanjia – Bac Ninh / Bac Giang, Vietnam
• 20,000–30,000 m² of production space with offset presses, corrugation, die-cutting and folding-gluing
20,000–30,000 m² of production space with offset presses, corrugation, die-cutting and folding-gluing
• Ideal for export-oriented cosmetic cartons, rigid boxes and retail packaging
Ideal for export-oriented cosmetic cartons, rigid boxes and retail packaging
Dongguan Xinyuan Printing Factory – Guangdong, China
• 30,000 m² facility with Heidelberg presses, Bobst die-cutters, rigid box lines and hot-foil/UV systems
30,000 m² facility with Heidelberg presses, Bobst die-cutters, rigid box lines and hot-foil/UV systems
• Specializes in premium rigid boxes, board games, color boxes and manuals for global brands
Specializes in premium rigid boxes, board games, color boxes and manuals for global brands
Together, these sites deliver high-volume capacity while keeping lead times short and quality consistent across markets.
Request a Cosmetic Gift Box Quotation or Sample
Planning a new perfume gift set, skincare launch or makeup PR box?

Share your drawings, artwork or sample pictures with our engineering team. We’ll recommend board grades, finishes and structure, then provide a detailed quotation including FOB port options from Vietnam and China.
